label: Applications
description: Receive an alert when a new application is submitted to your business.

label: Cashier
description: Receive an alert when someone pays at the cashiers.

label: Rating
description: Receive an alert when someone rates your business.

label: Duty
description: Receive an alert when your STAFF enters/leaves duty.

label: Employees
description: Receive an alert when an employee gets modified.

label: Bank Logs
description: Receive an alert when someone makes a deposit/withdraw.

label: Items
description: Receive an alert when someone add/edit/delete an item from your business.

label: Posters
description: Receive an alert when someone edits the business poster.

label: Supplies
description: Receive an alert when someone buys supplies for the business.
